arts.ttl: Crystal Palace keen on player desired by Sevilla – €10-15m for the deal
arts.sum: Crystal Palace and Sevilla are in the picture to sign Royal Antwerp’s Mahamadou Doumbia. That’s according to Africa Foot, and they mention Crystal Palace when covering Sevilla’s interest in the 20-year-old. The midfielder has played 36 games since joining the Belgian club from Nordsjælland in September 2023. arts.ttl: Palace table four year contract to free agent ace
arts.sum: Crystal Palace have reportedly offered a four year contract to a free agent ahead of a possible summer transfer window swoop. The player in question is Fenerbahce right-back Bright Osayi-Samuel, whose future is in serious doubt as he approaches the end of his contract with the Turkish giants. arts.ttl: FA Cup quarter-final draw IN FULL as Fulham face Crystal Palace
arts.sum: Fulham will be hoping that they can join Palace in the quarter-final draw when they travel to Manchester United . The draw for the quarter-final will take place following the clash at Old Trafford with just one tie on Monday night left to play as Nottingham Forest host Ipswich Town.
